{{Quote|Your plan worked perfectly, sir. While the Rebel scum are running in circles trying to figure out how much we know, we can amass a strike force and take them by surprise!|Rogor to [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]|<ref name="Imperial Spy">{{Kids1997Cite|issue1=11|issue2=15|story=Imperial Spy}}</ref>}}
'''Rogor''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]] during the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] occupation of [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]].

==Biography==
He was inserted as a Rebel [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]], and was trusted with vital Alliance data linked to the relocation of the Rebel Base. While his information was instrumental in the [[Evacuation of Yavin]], he was rooted out shortly before the battle.<ref name="Imperial Spy" />
